data.title: RED test: Gate 1a integration in fix-bug SKILL.md
data.description:
Create tests/skills/test_fix_bug_gate_1a.py with structural validation tests for Gate 1a integration in fix-bug SKILL.md plus one behavioral config test. Tests:

1. test_gate_1a_section_exists — SKILL.md contains Gate 1a or Intent Search section
2. test_gate_1a_dispatches_intent_search — section references intent-search agent dispatch
3. test_gate_1a_three_outcomes — all three outcome keywords present
4. test_gate_1a_auto_close_pattern — auto-close command with ticket transition + reason flag
5. test_gate_1a_auto_close_reason_prefix — --reason contains Fixed: Intent-contradicting prefix (Critical Rule 19)
6. test_gate_1a_evidence_comment — ticket comment step adjacent to auto-close for evidence citation
7. test_gate_1a_reads_budget_config — references debug.intent_search_budget
8. test_gate_1a_position — Gate 1a appears before investigation dispatch (Step 2)
9. test_gate_1a_signal_schema — references gate-signal-schema contract
10. test_gate_1a_failure_fallback — documents graceful degradation to ambiguous on agent failure
11. test_gate_1a_config_key_default — behavioral: calls read-config.sh via subprocess, asserts output is 20

Docstring: "Structural metadata validation of skill file — verifying design contract that Gate 1a integration exists, not implementation logic. Tests 1-10 are schema validation (acceptable structural category). Test 11 is behavioral."

Tests fail RED because Gate 1a is not yet in SKILL.md.

Append to EXISTING .test-index entry for fix-bug/SKILL.md (do not create duplicate line).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file exists
  Verify: test -f tests/skills/test_fix_bug_gate_1a.py
- [ ] Test file contains at least 11 test functions
  Verify: grep -c 'def test_' tests/skills/test_fix_bug_gate_1a.py | awk '{exit ($1 < 11)}'
- [ ] .test-index entry updated (appended to existing fix-bug/SKILL.md line)
  Verify: grep 'fix-bug/SKILL.md' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index | grep -q 'test_fix_bug_gate_1a'
- [ ] Running tests returns non-zero (RED) pre-implementation
  Verify: ! cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && python -m pytest tests/skills/test_fix_bug_gate_1a.py -q
